channel.title: ADC News
channel.description: Latest news from The ADC Archiver Project

item.title: ADC news RSS feed launched
item.description: ADC has a new RSS feed for simple news updates.

item.title: ADC 1.5.0 Release Candidate binaries available
item.description: The ADC 1.5.0 Release Candidate (RC) binaries are now available for testing. Check this page for the latest RC builds and provide feedback and open issues on Codeberg. https://codeberg.org/Mealman1551/adc_1.5.0_rc_bin/releases

item.title: Repository improvements
item.description: New issue templates, release asset packaging, and clearer contributor documentation have been added.

item.title: Open source contributions welcome
item.description: All contributions are welcome through GitHub. Submit issues, patches, or documentation improvements to help ADC grow.

item.title: ADC 1.4.5 LTS released
item.description: Improved stability and security updates are now available for Windows and Linux users with the latest LTS release.
